meaning: adj.法院的,适于法庭的,公开辩论的n.辩论术
examples: A forensic team was hunting for clues.
They were convicted on forensic evidence alone.
Forensic experts carried out a painstaking search of the debris.
"Further forensic testing will be conducted in Darwin, " a police spokesman told AFP news agency.
The bones were found in the first days of the dig and were eventually excavated under forensic conditions.
